hook.summary: A man and a turkey fall from a collapsing bridge onto a precarious stack of colorful blocks.
hook.visual_action: The bridge breaks, and the characters land on a block tower while a hand starts removing pieces.

scene_flow: A man and a turkey fall from a breaking bridge onto a stack of colorful blocks.
A hand removes blocks from the stack, causing the platform to tilt.
The man screams in terror as the turkey balances on the wobbling tower.
The player continues to remove blocks, making the structure increasingly unstable.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy physics-based puzzle games with a humorous or high-stakes theme.
